Protein names: Protein-L-isoaspartate O-methyltransferase (EC 2.1.1.77) (L-isoaspartyl protein carboxyl methyltransferase) (Protein L-isoaspartyl methyltransferase) (Protein-beta-aspartate methyltransferase) (PIMT)
Protein families: Methyltransferase superfamily, L-isoaspartyl/D-aspartyl protein methyltransferase family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. L-isoaspartyl/D-aspartyl protein methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_00090}.
